query:
SELECT ifa.id, ifa.organizationId, ifa.questionId, ifa.fileName, LEFT(ifa.fileUrl, 200) as urlPrefix, ifa.createdAt, o.name as orgName 
FROM intakeFileAttachments ifa 
JOIN implementationOrgs o ON o.id = ifa.organizationId 
WHERE o.slug LIKE '%RMCA%' OR o.name LIKE '%RMCA%'
ORDER BY ifa.createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
